nasb.text: There is no soundness in my flesh because of Your indignation; There is no health in my bones because of my sin.

esv.text: There is no soundness in my flesh because of your indignation; there is no health in my bones because of my sin.

cnv.text: 因你的忿怒，我體無完膚； 因我的罪惡，我的骨頭都不安妥。

ccb.text: 你的怒气使我浑身是病， 我的罪恶使我骨头朽烂。

csbs.text: 因你的愤怒， 我的肉体无一处健全； 因我的罪过， 我的骨头没有安宁；
